evals.prompt: I am writing a radical borylation intro. Find 8-12 papers from 2020 onward about Lewis base boryl radicals, include DOI and abstract when possible, and return import-ready records.
evals.expected_output: Deduplicated normalized records with title, authors, journal, year, DOI, abstract, URL, and relevance rationale.

evals.prompt: Search for mechanistic precedents on nickel-catalyzed radical coupling and prioritize high-impact journals. Keep only papers with strong mechanistic discussion.
evals.expected_output: Ranked paper list with clear relevance scoring and concise search summary.

evals.prompt: I have a messy list of paper titles with duplicates and typos. Please resolve DOIs where possible and output a clean import payload.
evals.expected_output: Cleaned records with duplicate removal and uncertainty notes for unresolved matches.
